channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news and analysis from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🏦 ECB to hike rates in June as Iran war fuels inflation spike
item.description: The European Central Bank will raise interest rates next month and at least once more this year to combat energy price shocks from the Middle East war, according to a Reuters poll of economists.

item.title: 🛢️ Wars in Iran and Ukraine knock out 9% of global oil refining capacity
item.description: Refinery attacks tied to the Iran and Ukraine wars have knocked out nearly 9% of global oil refining capacity in recent months, deepening fuel supply crunches and delaying recovery by months even after fighting ends.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India races to shield economy from Iran war-driven oil shock
item.description: A sustained spike in energy prices from the Iran war has clouded India macroeconomic outlook, spurring crisis-era measures to protect Asia third-largest economy.

item.title: 🛡️ NATO leaders call for stronger eastern flank air defense after Russian breaches
item.description: Leaders of 14 NATO allies said Russia repeated airspace violations underline the urgent need to consolidate alliance air defenses against missiles and drones.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU warns of risks from growing reliance on US gas
item.description: European energy regulators warned that the EU increasing dependence on U.S. gas carries risks, including rising reliance on a single supplier.

item.title: ⚓🇺🇸 US Navy Could Run Out of Money by July, Top Officer Warns
item.description: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle told lawmakers the Navy might have to modify operations if Congress does not pass a budget, highlighting funding concerns amid ongoing global deployments.

item.title: 🇮🇱🗳️ Netanyahu Coalition Submits Bill for Early Elections in Israel
item.description: Israel's ruling coalition moved to dissolve parliament, potentially triggering snap elections amid domestic political pressures during the ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇺🇺🇸🇨🇳 US Renews $100M Cuba Aid Offer as Trump Raises Island with Xi
item.description: Washington offered renewed humanitarian assistance to Cuba while Trump discussed the island nation in talks with Chinese leadership, highlighting competing influence efforts in the Caribbean.

item.title: 🇨🇳⚡🌍 Iran War Driving Global Shift Toward Chinese Clean Energy
item.description: The conflict with Iran is accelerating countries' transition to Chinese EVs, solar panels and batteries, strengthening Beijing's position ahead of Trump-Xi trade negotiations.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Unleashes 800 Drones on Ukraine in Daytime Barrage, Killing Six
item.description: Russia launched a massive daylight drone attack on about 20 Ukrainian regions, killing at least six and wounding dozens. Poland scrambled fighter jets as NATO borders were threatened by the scale of the assault.

item.title: ⛽ Ukraine Resumes Strikes on Russian Energy Infrastructure After Ceasefire Ends
item.description: Ukraine renewed attacks on Russian oil refineries and ports after a US-brokered ceasefire expired. The escalation comes as peace talks stall and both sides intensify energy infrastructure targeting.

item.title: 🌍 How the Iran War Has Reshaped Middle East Alliances and Economies
item.description: A comprehensive analysis of how the US-Israeli bombing campaign that began February 28 has destabilized the region, damaged infrastructure and economies, and overturned assumptions about regional security.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Iran War Brings Turkey-PKK Peace Process to Near Standstill
item.description: The regional turmoil from the Iran conflict has derailed Turkey's peace process with Kurdish militants. Just weeks after parliament advanced reconciliation efforts, the war plunged the region into new instability.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvia Government Loses Majority Over Ukraine Drone Incident Response
item.description: Latvia's ruling coalition lost its parliamentary majority after the Progressives party withdrew support over the government's handling of Ukraine-related drone incidents, deepening European political instability.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Places Former UK Defense Minister Ben Wallace on Wanted List
item.description: Moscow added Ben Wallace to its wanted list in connection with an unspecified criminal investigation, escalating tensions with Britain over Ukraine support.

item.title: 📈 US Producer Prices Post Biggest Increase in Four Years
item.description: Producer prices surged in April with the largest gain since 2022, driven by soaring costs for goods and services amid the Iran war, signaling accelerating inflation.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Gunshots at Philippine Senate as ICC-Wanted Senator Resists Arrest
item.description: Shots were fired inside the Philippine Senate as troops moved to arrest Senator Ronald dela Rosa, wanted by the International Criminal Court for crimes against humanity during Duterte's drug war.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump Lands in China for Xi Summit With Iran War Looming
item.description: President Trump arrived in Beijing for a high-stakes summit with President Xi, with the Iran war casting a shadow over talks on trade, technology, and regional security.

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria Urges Global Finance Overhaul as Debt Costs Consume Budget
item.description: President Tinubu warned that Nigeria will spend $11.6 billion on debt servicing in 2026 - nearly half of government revenue - calling for reform of a financial system that penalizes African borrowers.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Senate blocks Iran war powers challenge as conflict continues
item.description: Senate Republicans blocked a Democratic-led effort to end the Iran war until Congress authorizes it, while support for congressional oversight grows.

item.title: 💰 Fed officials signal rate hikes may be needed to curb inflation
item.description: Boston Fed President Collins and Minneapolis Fed President Kashkari both indicated interest rates may need to rise if inflation pressures persist, with the Iran war worsening price pressures.

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria urges global finance overhaul as debt costs consume half of revenue
item.description: President Tinubu called for reforming the global financial system, saying Nigeria will spend .6 billion on debt service in 2026 - nearly half of projected government revenue.

item.title: 🇬🇧 Bank of England to hold rates at 3.75% as Iran war fuels inflation
item.description: The BoE will likely keep rates steady this year, though a growing minority of economists expect a hike as energy price surges from the Iran conflict drive up inflation forecasts.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇦🇪 Netanyahu Held Secret Meeting With UAE President During Iran War
item.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu visited the UAE and met with the Emirati president during the Iran war, marking their first confirmed meeting and a "historic breakthrough" in relations.

item.title: 🇸🇦🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia Launched Covert Attacks on Iran During Regional War
item.description: Saudi Arabia carried out previously unreported military strikes on Iranian soil and targeted Tehran-backed militias in Iraq, marking the first known direct Saudi military action against Iran.
